name: James B.
text: Fantastic service from start to finish. They fixed our leaking roof quickly and the price was very fair. Highly recommend to anyone in Manchester.

name: Sarah K.
text: Called them for an emergency leak during a storm. They arrived within the hour and had it sorted the same day. Brilliant team — can't fault them.

name: Mark P.
text: Had a complete new roof fitted. The quality of workmanship is excellent and they left the site spotless. Very professional outfit.

name: Lisa W.
text: Repaired our flat roof that had been leaking for months. Other roofers couldn't find the problem but these lads sorted it permanently. Five stars.

name: David H.
text: Excellent chimney repair work. They repointed the stack and replaced all the flashing. No more leaks in the bedroom — thank you!

name: Rachel T.
text: Great communication throughout. They sent a detailed quote, turned up on time, and did a cracking job on our guttering. Would use again.

name: Andrew M.
text: Had storm damage to our roof tiles. They came out the same day and made it watertight. Came back the following week to do the permanent repair. Top service.

name: Jenny C.
text: We had three quotes for a new roof and these were the most reasonable by far. The work has been done to an incredibly high standard. Couldn't be happier.

name: Paul G.
text: Used them for a full re-roof on our Victorian terrace. They understood the character of the property and used appropriate materials. Brilliant result.

name: Karen N.
text: The team were polite, tidy, and efficient. They replaced our old felt flat roof with a GRP system and it looks fantastic. Highly recommended.

name: Tom B.
text: Emergency call-out on a Sunday morning — they were here within 45 minutes. Sorted the leak and tidied up perfectly. Can't ask for more than that.

name: Emma M.
text: From the initial inspection to the final clean-up, everything was handled professionally. Fair price, great work, and a proper guarantee. What more could you want?
